parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human presenter in a natural setting. Movements, facial expressions, and lighting are realistic, with no AI artifacts.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has long, straight brown hair and expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Black long-sleeved top and large silver over-ear headphones.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime. Potted plants and a colorful abstract painting are in the background. A black microphone on a boom arm is in the foreground.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long brown hair sits indoors, facing slightly left. She wears a black long-sleeved top and large silver over-ear headphones. A black microphone on an articulated arm is positioned in front of her. Behind her are several green potted plants and a colorful abstract painting on the wall. She gestures actively with her hands while speaking.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a young woman speaking into a microphone in a room with plants. Text captions of her speech appear on screen. A logo for 'BoldVoice' pops up briefly.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: No one tells you this if you're an immigrant, but accent discrimination is a real thing.
Character A says: There's this AI tool called BoldVoice.
Character A says: It's an app.
Character A says: The AI gives you real-time feedback on your pronunciation.
scenes.on_screen_text: No one tells you this if you're an immigrant, but accent discrimination is a real thing. There's this AI tool called BoldVoice. It's an app. The AI gives you real-time feedback on your pronunciation.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime. Potted plants and a colorful abstract painting are in the background. A black microphone on a boom arm is in the foreground.

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman is in the same indoor setting. She is now holding a silver smartphone in her right hand, looking at the screen and speaking into it. The microphone remains in front of her. She wears the same black top and silver headphones.

scenes.visual_description: The woman holds a smartphone and speaks into it. An overlay of the BoldVoice app interface appears on the left side of the screen, showing a pronunciation score for the word 'water'. Text captions of her speech are also visible.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Water.
Character A says: My 't' sound was not quite right.
Character A says: Water.
Character A says: Correct!
scenes.on_screen_text: water. my 't' sound was not quite right. water. Correct!

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime. Potted plants and a colorful abstract painting are in the background. A black microphone on a boom arm is in the foreground.

panels.panel_visual_description: The young woman continues to sit in the indoor setting, gesturing with her hands as she speaks. The microphone is in front of her, and the plants and artwork are visible in the background. She wears the black top and silver headphones.

scenes.visual_description: The woman continues speaking into the microphone. A large overlay of a smartphone displaying various screens of the BoldVoice app appears on the left side of the screen. The app screens show speech levels, top strengths, focus areas, and video clips of pronunciation coaches. Text captions of her speech appear at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: It personalizes your plan based on your accent test results and native language.
Character A says: So, that it can target the unique sounds that are difficult for you.
Character A says: You get to learn from Harvard-trained coaches who show you how to pronounce each word correctly.
scenes.on_screen_text: It personalizes your plan based on your accent test results and native language. So, that it can target the unique sounds that are difficult for you. You get to learn from Harvard-trained coaches who show you how to pronounce each word correctly.

scenes.visual_description: A dark screen with the BoldVoice logo, a 5-star rating graphic with '27,000 STAR RATING', an 'App Store' download button, and the text 'Speak English Confidently' and 'Get your first 7 days free'. A small phone mockup showing a coach is on the left.
scenes.on_screen_text: 27,000 STAR RATING. BoldVoice. Download on the App Store. Speak English Confidently. Get your first 7 days free.
